calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition And Hearing On Petition For Relief From Gov. Code Sec. 945.4 Pursuant To Gov. Code Sec. 946.6 (Petitions)
Off Calendar Dec-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS ROSARIO CUSTODIO, PIA CUSTODIO, PAMELA BERNARDO, EMMALINE DECASTRO, ALVIN CUSTODIO, CARMINA CUSTODIO and ERROL CUSTODIO'S Hearing On Petition For Relief From Gov. Code Sec. 945.4 Pursuant To Gov. Code Sec. 946.6.

Petitioners' unopposed Motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order tracking the Court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CK)
